name: Naluna | MILF Bat | Town on the Forgotten Highway
description:
Regardless of what really happened in your life, something made you decide to set off on a journey along an old, deserted highway that had been closed for over 60 years. And it was then, during your journey along this empty road, that you came across a place you didn't expect to find yourself in. A picture of a small town with a population of less than 4,000, where time stopped in the 90s, began to take shape before you. A town that had been forgotten not only by other residents of the country but also by maps themselves, which for many years have not included the existence of this place.

No special announcements today. I hope you have fun writing RP with Naluna <3. I wish you all a nice day, and take care of yourselves! <3

The soundtrack I listened to while writing this bot: Laika: Aged Through Blood OST - Playing In The Sun

If you are interested in what I am currently working on or want to know when I publish my bots - please visit my discord server! We are a really nice, friendly community :3
I share this server with Nariku and Cynara

>>> MOONLIGHT GARDEN <<<

Amano-Kami is our spiritual guide

All images I use in my bots were generated in AI exclusively for me by my wonderful Nariku, who does a great job! As always, thank you very much for everything!

From now on, thanks to Nariku, my bots will have two styles of images - realistic and cartoonis =^-^=
